question: Find the name and powertrain type of the cars that rented for more than 30 total hours.
sql: SELECT Vehicles.name, Vehicles.Type_of_powertrain FROM Vehicles JOIN Renting_history ON Vehicles.id = Renting_history.vehicles_id WHERE Renting_history.total_hours > 30;

semantic.reason: 语义一致，原始问题要求查找租用总时长超过30小时的车辆名称和动力系统类型，SQL反向翻译描述中的意图、涉及的表、列、过滤条件均与之匹配，无差异。
